name: DarkMode V4

Disable-selector-button.name: Disable selector button
Disable-selector-button.description: This hide the selector button from the menu

Disable-updates-indicator.name: Disable updates indicator
Disable-updates-indicator.description: Removes the visual indicator shown when a texture pack has an available update.

Disable-Happy-Textures.name: Disable HT Fix
Disable-Happy-Textures.description: This option disables the CCScale9Sprite fix thing for Happy Textures mod, disable this option if you want to use it

issues.info: Post your issues on the <cp>Issue tracking repository</c>.

description:
Change the entire game interface to darker tones,
 in addition to being able to choose between the colors of some details.
